title: teucrium algarbiense
intro: Teucrium algarbiense, also known as the Algarve Teucrium, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. It belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and aromatic leaves. The medicinal properties of Teucrium algarbiense are attributed to its essential oils, which are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, and have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for herbal remedies.
